Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema used by org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
    Class
    Description
    MarshallingDefMapper
    Interface used to retrieve identifiers and URIs for bean classes.
    TypeCategory
    Represents possible values for JSONSCHEMA_addExamplesTo and JSONSCHEMA_addDescriptionsTo.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
    Class
    Description
    MarshallingDefMapper
    Interface used to retrieve identifiers and URIs for bean classes.
    TypeCategory
    Represents possible values for JSONSCHEMA_addExamplesTo and JSONSCHEMA_addDescriptionsTo.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
    Class
    Description
    JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the JSON-Schema pulled from the @Schema annotation on the bean property.
    JsonSchemaClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the JSON-Schema serializer and pulled from the @Schema annotation on the class.
    JsonSchemaMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to JsonSchemaClassMeta and JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    MarshallingDefMapper
    Interface used to retrieve identifiers and URIs for bean classes.
    TypeCategory
    Represents possible values for JSONSCHEMA_addExamplesTo and JSONSCHEMA_addDescriptionsTo.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
    Class
    Description
    JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the JSON-Schema pulled from the @Schema annotation on the bean property.
    JsonSchemaClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the JSON-Schema serializer and pulled from the @Schema annotation on the class.
    JsonSchemaConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in JsonSchemaGenerator.
    JsonSchemaGenerator
    Generates JSON-schema metadata about POJOs.
    JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSchemaGeneratorSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSchemaSerializer.
    JsonSchemaGeneratorSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSchemaMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to JsonSchemaClassMeta and JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    MarshallingDefMapper
    Interface used to retrieve identifiers and URIs for bean classes.
    TypeCategory
    Represents possible values for JSONSCHEMA_addExamplesTo and JSONSCHEMA_addDescriptionsTo.
